messages.content:
You are a clinical reasoning agent for adult acute abdominal pain. At each decision step you are given the patient's current state (baseline + the imaging reports available SO FAR, with this step's result hidden) and a rubric covering four index diseases plus an open 'other' slot. You decide the next imaging move and explain it.

Output a single JSON object, no prose around it, with EXACTLY these keys:
  "belief": object mapping each of {appendicitis, cholecystitis, diverticulitis, pancreatitis, other} to a probability summing to ~1 (your current differential).
  "modality": one of {CT_Abdomen, Ultrasound_Abdomen, MRCP_Abdomen, MRI_Abdomen, CTU_Abdomen} — the imaging you order next.
  "information_gap": the specific question this study must answer.
  "expected_finding": what you expect to see if your leading hypothesis holds.
  "action_role": one of {localize_source, rule_in, rule_out, assess_severity, broaden_search}.
  "grounding": a list of short quotes/values from the patient state that justify the above.
  "other_hypothesis": when belief argmax is 'other', name the leading non-rubric process; else "".

Route yourself: your belief argmax selects which disease path you are on. Choosing 'other' means leaving the rubric. Ground every claim in the patient state.

=== RUBRIC ===
### appendicitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Appendicitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - ALVARADO [Alvarado Score Calculation] tests:[Lab_Panel] Requires: CBC with differential + physical examination Score 0–10:   ① Migration of pain to RLQ  +1   ② Anorexia                  +1   ③ Nau…
  - OBSERVE [Observe / Discharge with Follow-up] tests:[—] Low risk (Alvarado ≤3): outpatient monitoring acceptable / 低风险，观察或出院随访
  - EXCLUDED_LOW [Appendicitis Low Risk (Outpatient Monitoring)] tests:[—] Alvarado ≤3 — low pre-test probability; outpatient monitoring acceptable. NOT a definitive exclusion: ~10% PPV at this score threshold. 低风险（…
  - US_ABDOMEN [Abdominal Ultrasound] tests:[Ultrasound_Abdomen] Preferred first-line for: children, pregnant women, young females 中风险4–6分首选超声（儿童/孕妇/年轻女性优先）
  - US_FINDINGS [US Findings — Appendicitis Confirmed by Ultrasound] tests:[—] Appendicitis confirmed on US; assess for complications visible on US CT not required when US is diagnostic (WSES 2020) 超声确认阑尾炎，评估超声下并发症征象；超声…
  - CT_ABD_MID [CT Abdomen/Pelvis with IV Contrast (after non-diagnostic US)] tests:[—] After non-diagnostic US in intermediate-risk patients Sensitivity >95% for appendicitis / 超声不确定后进行CT（敏感性>95%）
  - CT_ABD_HIGH [CT Abdomen/Pelvis or Direct Surgical Consult (High Risk)] tests:[—] High risk (Alvarado 7–10) Males < 40y may proceed directly to surgical consult without CT 高风险直接CT或手术会诊（<40岁男性可直接手术会诊）
  - CT_FINDINGS [CT Findings Evaluation] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Interpret CT for appendicitis confirmation / CT结果判断
  - EXCLUDED_CT [Appendicitis Excluded / Alternative Diagnosis] tests:[—] CT negative for appendicitis / CT阴性，排除阑尾炎
  - UNCOMPLICATED [Uncomplicated Appendicitis] tests:[—] Appendicitis confirmed (US or CT); no perforation / abscess / phlegmon → Surgical consult: laparoscopic appendectomy vs antibiotics 非复杂性阑尾炎（…
  - COMPLICATED [Complicated Appendicitis] tests:[—] Appendicitis confirmed (US or CT) with perforation / abscess / phlegmon → Surgical consult required 复杂性阑尾炎（超声或CT见穿孔/脓肿/蜂窝织炎）— 外科会诊
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> ALVARADO  (always)
  - ALVARADO -> OBSERVE  (Score ≤3 — Low Risk)
  - OBSERVE -> EXCLUDED_LOW  (always)
  - ALVARADO -> US_ABDOMEN  (Score 4–6 — Intermediate Risk → Ultrasound)
  - US_ABDOMEN -> US_FINDINGS  (US positive — appendix visualized, inflamed)
  - US_FINDINGS -> UNCOMPLICATED  (US positive — no perforation/abscess on US)
  - US_FINDINGS -> COMPLICATED  (US positive — perforation/abscess on US)
  - US_ABDOMEN -> CT_ABD_MID  (US negative or non-diagnostic)
  - CT_ABD_MID -> CT_FINDINGS  (always)
  - ALVARADO -> CT_ABD_HIGH  (Score 7–10 — High Risk → CT or Surgical Consult)
  - CT_ABD_HIGH -> CT_FINDINGS  (always)
  - CT_FINDINGS -> EXCLUDED_CT  (CT negative)
  - CT_FINDINGS -> UNCOMPLICATED  (CT positive — no perforation / abscess)
  - CT_FINDINGS -> COMPLICATED  (CT positive — perforation / abscess / phlegmon)

### cholecystitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Cholecystitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - GROUP_A [TG18 Group A — Local Inflammation Signs] tests:[—] Physical examination:   ① Murphy's sign positive   ② RUQ pain / tenderness / palpable mass 局部炎症体征（体格检查）
  - GROUP_B [TG18 Group B — Systemic Inflammation Signs] tests:[Lab_Panel] Labs + vitals + HPI narrative:   ① Fever > 38 °C (admission PE vitals)   ② Fever reported in HPI (home/pre-admission fever history)   ③ CRP …
  - AB_DECISION [Both Group A AND Group B Met?] tests:[Lab_Panel] TG18 suspected diagnosis gate 疑似诊断门控：A组≥1项 AND B组≥1项
  - NOT_SUSPECTED_CLINICAL [Cholecystitis Not Suspected (Clinical Only)] tests:[—] Neither TG18 Group A nor Group B met — no local or systemic signs of cholecystitis. NOT imaging-confirmed exclusion; very low clinical suspi…
  - NOT_SUSPECTED_IMAGING [Cholecystitis Excluded (Imaging Confirmed)] tests:[—] Additional imaging (HIDA/CT/MRCP) negative — diagnosis excluded. 影像学阴性确认排除胆囊炎
  - IMAGING_US [Abdominal Ultrasound (TG18 Group C)] tests:[Ultrasound_Abdomen] First-line imaging:   - GB wall thickening > 4mm   - Pericholecystic fluid   - Sonographic Murphy's sign   - Gallstones 腹部超声首选（胆囊壁增厚/胆囊周围积液/…
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING [Additional Imaging (US inconclusive)] tests:[—] HIDA scan (functional; preferred for acalculous) OR CT Abdomen (anatomical detail) OR MRCP (if biliary stones suspected) Also check: LFTs · …
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL [MRCP for Suspected Choledocholithiasis] tests:[MRCP_Abdomen] Evaluate for common bile duct stones if biliary etiology suspected 追加MRCP排查胆总管结石
  - SEVERITY_GRADING [TG18 Severity Grading] tests:[—] Requires confirmed diagnosis (A+B+C) Assess organ dysfunction and local complications 确定诊断后进行TG18严重度分级
  - GRADE_I [Grade I — Mild Cholecystitis] tests:[—] No organ dysfunction · mild GB disease 轻度：无器官功能障碍，轻度胆囊炎症
  - GRADE_II [Grade II — Moderate Cholecystitis] tests:[—] No organ dysfunction + ≥1 local complication criterion:   - WBC > 18,000   - Palpable tender RUQ mass   - Symptom duration > 72h   - Gangren…
  - GRADE_III [Grade III — Severe Cholecystitis] tests:[—] ≥1 organ system dysfunction:   cardiovascular · neurological · respiratory   renal · hepatic · hematologic 重度：≥1项器官系统功能障碍
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> GROUP_A  (always)
  - SUSPECTED -> GROUP_B  (always)
  - GROUP_A -> AB_DECISION  (Group A assessment complete)
  - GROUP_B -> AB_DECISION  (Group B assessment complete (Lab_Panel done))
  - AB_DECISION -> IMAGING_US  (A ≥1 AND B ≥1 → Strong suspicion — proceed to imaging)
  - AB_DECISION -> IMAGING_US  (A ≥1 OR B ≥1 → Weak suspicion — proceed to imaging)
  - AB_DECISION -> NOT_SUSPECTED_CLINICAL  (Neither A nor B criteria met → Not suspected (clinical only))
  - IMAGING_US -> MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL  (US positive + Elevated LFTs/Bilirubin → Check CBD stones)
  - IMAGING_US -> SEVERITY_GRADING  (US positive — definite diagnosis (no high risk for CBD stones))
  - IMAGING_US -> ADDITIONAL_IMAGING  (US inconclusive or negative)
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING -> MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL  (Additional imaging positive + Elevated LFTs/Bilirubin → Check CBD stones)
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING -> SEVERITY_GRADING  (Additional imaging positive (no high risk for CBD stones or MRCP done))
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL -> SEVERITY_GRADING  (always)
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING -> NOT_SUSPECTED_IMAGING  (Additional imaging negative — diagnosis excluded by imaging)
  - SEVERITY_GRADING -> GRADE_III  (≥1 organ system dysfunction)
  - SEVERITY_GRADING -> GRADE_II  (No organ dysfunction + local complication criteria)
  - SEVERITY_GRADING -> GRADE_I  (No organ dysfunction, no local complications)

### diverticulitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Diverticulitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - LABS [Laboratory Workup] tests:[Lab_Panel] CBC (WBC) · BMP · CRP · UA · β-hCG (females) Note: WBC normal in ~45% of patients CRP > 200 mg/L suggests possible perforation 实验室检查（WBC在45%…
  - CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT [Clinical Assessment] tests:[—] Assess suspicion level and risk factors 临床评估：怀疑程度 + 危险因素
  - CLINICAL_DIAGNOSIS [Clinical Diagnosis (tentative)] tests:[—] High suspicion: LLQ + fever + CRP↑ + WBC↑, no high-risk features Accuracy only 40–65%; imaging confirmation strongly recommended 高度怀疑可临床诊断，但…
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS [CT Abdomen/Pelvis with IV Contrast] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Gold standard: sensitivity 94%, specificity 99% 诊断金标准（敏感性94%，特异性99%）
  - CT_NEGATIVE [Diverticulitis Excluded / Alternative Diagnosis] tests:[—] CT negative for diverticulitis / CT阴性，排除憩室炎
  - UNCOMPLICATED [Uncomplicated Diverticulitis] tests:[—] Wall thickening + pericolic fat stranding No abscess / perforation / fistula / obstruction 非复杂性憩室炎 — 肠壁增厚+结肠周围脂肪浸润，无并发症
  - HINCHEY_GRADING [Hinchey Classification] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Classify complications by CT findings 基于CT表现进行Hinchey并发症分级
  - HINCHEY_IA [Hinchey Ia — Phlegmon / Pericolic Inflammation] tests:[—] Treatment: antibiotics / 治疗：抗生素
  - HINCHEY_IB [Hinchey Ib — Localized Abscess < 3cm] tests:[—] Treatment: antibiotics ± percutaneous drainage / 治疗：抗生素 ± 穿刺引流
  - HINCHEY_II [Hinchey II — Distant / Pelvic Abscess ≥ 3cm] tests:[—] Treatment: interventional drainage + antibiotics / 治疗：介入穿刺引流 + 抗生素
  - HINCHEY_III [Hinchey III — Purulent Peritonitis] tests:[—] Treatment: emergency surgery / 治疗：急诊手术
  - HINCHEY_IV [Hinchey IV — Fecal Peritonitis] tests:[—] Treatment: emergency surgery / 治疗：急诊手术
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> LABS  (always)
  - LABS -> CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT  (always)
  - CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT -> CLINICAL_DIAGNOSIS  (High suspicion: LLQ + fever + CRP↑/WBC↑, no high-risk features)
  - CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT -> CT_ABD_PELVIS  (Uncertain OR suspected complications OR high-risk features)
  - CLINICAL_DIAGNOSIS -> CT_ABD_PELVIS  (always)
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS -> CT_NEGATIVE  (CT negative — alternative diagnosis)
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS -> UNCOMPLICATED  (Wall thickening + fat stranding; no complications)
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS -> HINCHEY_GRADING  (Complications present on CT)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_IV  (Fecal peritonitis)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_III  (Purulent peritonitis (no fecal))
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_II  (Distant / pelvic abscess ≥ 3cm)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_IB  (Localized abscess < 3cm)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_IA  (Phlegmon / pericolic inflammation only)

### pancreatitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Pancreatitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA [Revised Atlanta Diagnostic Criteria] tests:[Lab_Panel] ≥2 of 3 criteria required for diagnosis:   ① Upper abdominal pain (epigastric, may radiate to back)   ② Lipase or Amylase ≥ 3× ULN   ③ Chara…
  - CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC [CT or MRI Abdomen (for diagnostic uncertainty)] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Ordered when only 1 criterion is met Purpose: confirm pancreatitis and exclude other diagnoses 仅满足1条标准时行CT/MRI排除其他病因
  - EXCLUDED [Pancreatitis Excluded — Alternative Diagnosis] tests:[—] Imaging does not support pancreatitis / 影像学不支持胰腺炎
  - CONFIRMED [Acute Pancreatitis Confirmed] tests:[Ultrasound_Abdomen] Admit + IV fluids + pain management Abdominal US: assess for gallstones (biliary etiology is most common) Evaluate etiology: biliary / alcoh…
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL [MRCP for Suspected Biliary Pancreatitis] tests:[MRCP_Abdomen] Evaluate for choledocholithiasis if biliary etiology suspected 追加MRCP排查胆总管结石
  - BISAP [BISAP Score (within 24h of admission)] tests:[Lab_Panel] BISAP Score 0–5 (each item = 1 point):   ① BUN > 25 mg/dL   ② Impaired mental status (Glasgow < 15)   ③ SIRS ≥ 2 criteria (temp/HR/RR/WBC)  …
  - ATLANTA_LOW [Revised Atlanta Assessment — Low Risk (BISAP 0–2)] tests:[—] Predicted mortality < 2% Assess organ failure using Modified Marshall Score 低风险（死亡率<2%），评估器官功能障碍
  - ATLANTA_HIGH [Revised Atlanta Assessment — High Risk (BISAP ≥3)] tests:[—] Predicted mortality > 15% ICU monitoring Contrast-enhanced CT recommended at 48–72h for necrosis assessment (CT is a management recommendati…
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS [Organ Failure Assessment (Modified Marshall Score)] tests:[—] Evaluate: cardiovascular, respiratory, renal organ systems Classify as: no failure / transient (<48h) / persistent (>48h) 评估器官衰竭：无/短暂性(<48h)…
  - MILD_AP [Mild Acute Pancreatitis] tests:[—] No organ failure · no local complications · no systemic complications Typically resolves within 72h 轻度：无器官衰竭，无局部/全身并发症，通常72h内自行恢复
  - MODERATELY_SEVERE_AP [Moderately Severe Acute Pancreatitis] tests:[—] Transient organ failure < 48h (self-resolving) AND/OR local complications (peripancreatic fluid / necrosis) 中重度：短暂性器官衰竭<48h 和/或 局部并发症（积液/坏死）
  - CT_CTSI [Contrast-Enhanced CT Abdomen/Pelvis — CTSI Scoring (at 48–72h)] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Modified CT Severity Index (CTSI) 0–10:   Pancreatic inflammation + necrosis + extrapancreatic complications CT严重度指数（CTSI）0-10分：评估炎症范围+坏死程度+…
  - SEVERE_AP [Severe Acute Pancreatitis] tests:[—] Persistent organ failure > 48h ICU management · infected necrosis debridement / drainage 重度：持续性器官衰竭>48h，ICU管理，处理感染性坏死
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA  (always)
  - DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA -> CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC  (Only 1 criterion met — imaging required for confirmation)
  - DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA -> CONFIRMED  (≥2 criteria met — Acute Pancreatitis confirmed)
  - CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC -> CONFIRMED  (Imaging confirms pancreatitis)
  - CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC -> EXCLUDED  (Imaging does not support pancreatitis)
  - CONFIRMED -> MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL  (Biliary etiology suspected (Elevated LFTs/Bilirubin or US gallstones))
  - CONFIRMED -> BISAP  (No biliary signs → Proceed to risk stratification)
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL -> BISAP  (always)
  - BISAP -> ATLANTA_LOW  (BISAP 0–2 — Low Risk (mortality <2%))
  - BISAP -> ATLANTA_HIGH  (BISAP ≥3 — High Risk (mortality >15%))
  - ATLANTA_LOW -> ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS  (always)
  - ATLANTA_HIGH -> ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS  (always)
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS -> MILD_AP  (No organ failure, no local/systemic complications)
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS -> MODERATELY_SEVERE_AP  (Transient organ failure <48h AND/OR local complications)
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS -> CT_CTSI  (Persistent organ failure >48h → CT for CTSI scoring)
  - CT_CTSI -> SEVERE_AP  (always)

### other (open differential)
No sub-rubric. Open acute-abdomen differential (gynecologic, urologic, bowel obstruction, mesenteric ischemia, bile-duct/biliary obstruction, …). Choosing 'other' = leaving the rubric; judged by outcome, not a priori wrong.
Biliary axis: If the 'other' belief is a bile-DUCT process (choledocholithiasis / cholangitis / CBD obstruction / post-ERCP), the duct-evaluating modalities are Ultrasound_Abdomen and MRCP_Abdomen.

## Baseline

messages.content:
You are a clinical reasoning agent for adult acute abdominal pain. At each decision step you are given the patient's current state (baseline + the imaging reports available SO FAR, with this step's result hidden) and a rubric covering four index diseases plus an open 'other' slot. You decide the next imaging move and explain it.

Output a single JSON object, no prose around it, with EXACTLY these keys:
  "belief": object mapping each of {appendicitis, cholecystitis, diverticulitis, pancreatitis, other} to a probability summing to ~1 (your current differential).
  "modality": one of {CT_Abdomen, Ultrasound_Abdomen, MRCP_Abdomen, MRI_Abdomen, CTU_Abdomen} — the imaging you order next.
  "information_gap": the specific question this study must answer.
  "expected_finding": what you expect to see if your leading hypothesis holds.
  "action_role": one of {localize_source, rule_in, rule_out, assess_severity, broaden_search}.
  "grounding": a list of short quotes/values from the patient state that justify the above.
  "other_hypothesis": when belief argmax is 'other', name the leading non-rubric process; else "".

Route yourself: your belief argmax selects which disease path you are on. Choosing 'other' means leaving the rubric. Ground every claim in the patient state.

=== RUBRIC ===
### appendicitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Appendicitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - ALVARADO [Alvarado Score Calculation] tests:[Lab_Panel] Requires: CBC with differential + physical examination Score 0–10:   ① Migration of pain to RLQ  +1   ② Anorexia                  +1   ③ Nau…
  - OBSERVE [Observe / Discharge with Follow-up] tests:[—] Low risk (Alvarado ≤3): outpatient monitoring acceptable / 低风险，观察或出院随访
  - EXCLUDED_LOW [Appendicitis Low Risk (Outpatient Monitoring)] tests:[—] Alvarado ≤3 — low pre-test probability; outpatient monitoring acceptable. NOT a definitive exclusion: ~10% PPV at this score threshold. 低风险（…
  - US_ABDOMEN [Abdominal Ultrasound] tests:[Ultrasound_Abdomen] Preferred first-line for: children, pregnant women, young females 中风险4–6分首选超声（儿童/孕妇/年轻女性优先）
  - US_FINDINGS [US Findings — Appendicitis Confirmed by Ultrasound] tests:[—] Appendicitis confirmed on US; assess for complications visible on US CT not required when US is diagnostic (WSES 2020) 超声确认阑尾炎，评估超声下并发症征象；超声…
  - CT_ABD_MID [CT Abdomen/Pelvis with IV Contrast (after non-diagnostic US)] tests:[—] After non-diagnostic US in intermediate-risk patients Sensitivity >95% for appendicitis / 超声不确定后进行CT（敏感性>95%）
  - CT_ABD_HIGH [CT Abdomen/Pelvis or Direct Surgical Consult (High Risk)] tests:[—] High risk (Alvarado 7–10) Males < 40y may proceed directly to surgical consult without CT 高风险直接CT或手术会诊（<40岁男性可直接手术会诊）
  - CT_FINDINGS [CT Findings Evaluation] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Interpret CT for appendicitis confirmation / CT结果判断
  - EXCLUDED_CT [Appendicitis Excluded / Alternative Diagnosis] tests:[—] CT negative for appendicitis / CT阴性，排除阑尾炎
  - UNCOMPLICATED [Uncomplicated Appendicitis] tests:[—] Appendicitis confirmed (US or CT); no perforation / abscess / phlegmon → Surgical consult: laparoscopic appendectomy vs antibiotics 非复杂性阑尾炎（…
  - COMPLICATED [Complicated Appendicitis] tests:[—] Appendicitis confirmed (US or CT) with perforation / abscess / phlegmon → Surgical consult required 复杂性阑尾炎（超声或CT见穿孔/脓肿/蜂窝织炎）— 外科会诊
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> ALVARADO  (always)
  - ALVARADO -> OBSERVE  (Score ≤3 — Low Risk)
  - OBSERVE -> EXCLUDED_LOW  (always)
  - ALVARADO -> US_ABDOMEN  (Score 4–6 — Intermediate Risk → Ultrasound)
  - US_ABDOMEN -> US_FINDINGS  (US positive — appendix visualized, inflamed)
  - US_FINDINGS -> UNCOMPLICATED  (US positive — no perforation/abscess on US)
  - US_FINDINGS -> COMPLICATED  (US positive — perforation/abscess on US)
  - US_ABDOMEN -> CT_ABD_MID  (US negative or non-diagnostic)
  - CT_ABD_MID -> CT_FINDINGS  (always)
  - ALVARADO -> CT_ABD_HIGH  (Score 7–10 — High Risk → CT or Surgical Consult)
  - CT_ABD_HIGH -> CT_FINDINGS  (always)
  - CT_FINDINGS -> EXCLUDED_CT  (CT negative)
  - CT_FINDINGS -> UNCOMPLICATED  (CT positive — no perforation / abscess)
  - CT_FINDINGS -> COMPLICATED  (CT positive — perforation / abscess / phlegmon)

### cholecystitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Cholecystitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - GROUP_A [TG18 Group A — Local Inflammation Signs] tests:[—] Physical examination:   ① Murphy's sign positive   ② RUQ pain / tenderness / palpable mass 局部炎症体征（体格检查）
  - GROUP_B [TG18 Group B — Systemic Inflammation Signs] tests:[Lab_Panel] Labs + vitals + HPI narrative:   ① Fever > 38 °C (admission PE vitals)   ② Fever reported in HPI (home/pre-admission fever history)   ③ CRP …
  - AB_DECISION [Both Group A AND Group B Met?] tests:[Lab_Panel] TG18 suspected diagnosis gate 疑似诊断门控：A组≥1项 AND B组≥1项
  - NOT_SUSPECTED_CLINICAL [Cholecystitis Not Suspected (Clinical Only)] tests:[—] Neither TG18 Group A nor Group B met — no local or systemic signs of cholecystitis. NOT imaging-confirmed exclusion; very low clinical suspi…
  - NOT_SUSPECTED_IMAGING [Cholecystitis Excluded (Imaging Confirmed)] tests:[—] Additional imaging (HIDA/CT/MRCP) negative — diagnosis excluded. 影像学阴性确认排除胆囊炎
  - IMAGING_US [Abdominal Ultrasound (TG18 Group C)] tests:[Ultrasound_Abdomen] First-line imaging:   - GB wall thickening > 4mm   - Pericholecystic fluid   - Sonographic Murphy's sign   - Gallstones 腹部超声首选（胆囊壁增厚/胆囊周围积液/…
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING [Additional Imaging (US inconclusive)] tests:[—] HIDA scan (functional; preferred for acalculous) OR CT Abdomen (anatomical detail) OR MRCP (if biliary stones suspected) Also check: LFTs · …
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL [MRCP for Suspected Choledocholithiasis] tests:[MRCP_Abdomen] Evaluate for common bile duct stones if biliary etiology suspected 追加MRCP排查胆总管结石
  - SEVERITY_GRADING [TG18 Severity Grading] tests:[—] Requires confirmed diagnosis (A+B+C) Assess organ dysfunction and local complications 确定诊断后进行TG18严重度分级
  - GRADE_I [Grade I — Mild Cholecystitis] tests:[—] No organ dysfunction · mild GB disease 轻度：无器官功能障碍，轻度胆囊炎症
  - GRADE_II [Grade II — Moderate Cholecystitis] tests:[—] No organ dysfunction + ≥1 local complication criterion:   - WBC > 18,000   - Palpable tender RUQ mass   - Symptom duration > 72h   - Gangren…
  - GRADE_III [Grade III — Severe Cholecystitis] tests:[—] ≥1 organ system dysfunction:   cardiovascular · neurological · respiratory   renal · hepatic · hematologic 重度：≥1项器官系统功能障碍
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> GROUP_A  (always)
  - SUSPECTED -> GROUP_B  (always)
  - GROUP_A -> AB_DECISION  (Group A assessment complete)
  - GROUP_B -> AB_DECISION  (Group B assessment complete (Lab_Panel done))
  - AB_DECISION -> IMAGING_US  (A ≥1 AND B ≥1 → Strong suspicion — proceed to imaging)
  - AB_DECISION -> IMAGING_US  (A ≥1 OR B ≥1 → Weak suspicion — proceed to imaging)
  - AB_DECISION -> NOT_SUSPECTED_CLINICAL  (Neither A nor B criteria met → Not suspected (clinical only))
  - IMAGING_US -> MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL  (US positive + Elevated LFTs/Bilirubin → Check CBD stones)
  - IMAGING_US -> SEVERITY_GRADING  (US positive — definite diagnosis (no high risk for CBD stones))
  - IMAGING_US -> ADDITIONAL_IMAGING  (US inconclusive or negative)
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING -> MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL  (Additional imaging positive + Elevated LFTs/Bilirubin → Check CBD stones)
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING -> SEVERITY_GRADING  (Additional imaging positive (no high risk for CBD stones or MRCP done))
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL -> SEVERITY_GRADING  (always)
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING -> NOT_SUSPECTED_IMAGING  (Additional imaging negative — diagnosis excluded by imaging)
  - SEVERITY_GRADING -> GRADE_III  (≥1 organ system dysfunction)
  - SEVERITY_GRADING -> GRADE_II  (No organ dysfunction + local complication criteria)
  - SEVERITY_GRADING -> GRADE_I  (No organ dysfunction, no local complications)

### diverticulitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Diverticulitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - LABS [Laboratory Workup] tests:[Lab_Panel] CBC (WBC) · BMP · CRP · UA · β-hCG (females) Note: WBC normal in ~45% of patients CRP > 200 mg/L suggests possible perforation 实验室检查（WBC在45%…
  - CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT [Clinical Assessment] tests:[—] Assess suspicion level and risk factors 临床评估：怀疑程度 + 危险因素
  - CLINICAL_DIAGNOSIS [Clinical Diagnosis (tentative)] tests:[—] High suspicion: LLQ + fever + CRP↑ + WBC↑, no high-risk features Accuracy only 40–65%; imaging confirmation strongly recommended 高度怀疑可临床诊断，但…
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS [CT Abdomen/Pelvis with IV Contrast] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Gold standard: sensitivity 94%, specificity 99% 诊断金标准（敏感性94%，特异性99%）
  - CT_NEGATIVE [Diverticulitis Excluded / Alternative Diagnosis] tests:[—] CT negative for diverticulitis / CT阴性，排除憩室炎
  - UNCOMPLICATED [Uncomplicated Diverticulitis] tests:[—] Wall thickening + pericolic fat stranding No abscess / perforation / fistula / obstruction 非复杂性憩室炎 — 肠壁增厚+结肠周围脂肪浸润，无并发症
  - HINCHEY_GRADING [Hinchey Classification] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Classify complications by CT findings 基于CT表现进行Hinchey并发症分级
  - HINCHEY_IA [Hinchey Ia — Phlegmon / Pericolic Inflammation] tests:[—] Treatment: antibiotics / 治疗：抗生素
  - HINCHEY_IB [Hinchey Ib — Localized Abscess < 3cm] tests:[—] Treatment: antibiotics ± percutaneous drainage / 治疗：抗生素 ± 穿刺引流
  - HINCHEY_II [Hinchey II — Distant / Pelvic Abscess ≥ 3cm] tests:[—] Treatment: interventional drainage + antibiotics / 治疗：介入穿刺引流 + 抗生素
  - HINCHEY_III [Hinchey III — Purulent Peritonitis] tests:[—] Treatment: emergency surgery / 治疗：急诊手术
  - HINCHEY_IV [Hinchey IV — Fecal Peritonitis] tests:[—] Treatment: emergency surgery / 治疗：急诊手术
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> LABS  (always)
  - LABS -> CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT  (always)
  - CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT -> CLINICAL_DIAGNOSIS  (High suspicion: LLQ + fever + CRP↑/WBC↑, no high-risk features)
  - CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT -> CT_ABD_PELVIS  (Uncertain OR suspected complications OR high-risk features)
  - CLINICAL_DIAGNOSIS -> CT_ABD_PELVIS  (always)
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS -> CT_NEGATIVE  (CT negative — alternative diagnosis)
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS -> UNCOMPLICATED  (Wall thickening + fat stranding; no complications)
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS -> HINCHEY_GRADING  (Complications present on CT)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_IV  (Fecal peritonitis)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_III  (Purulent peritonitis (no fecal))
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_II  (Distant / pelvic abscess ≥ 3cm)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_IB  (Localized abscess < 3cm)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_IA  (Phlegmon / pericolic inflammation only)

### pancreatitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Pancreatitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA [Revised Atlanta Diagnostic Criteria] tests:[Lab_Panel] ≥2 of 3 criteria required for diagnosis:   ① Upper abdominal pain (epigastric, may radiate to back)   ② Lipase or Amylase ≥ 3× ULN   ③ Chara…
  - CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC [CT or MRI Abdomen (for diagnostic uncertainty)] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Ordered when only 1 criterion is met Purpose: confirm pancreatitis and exclude other diagnoses 仅满足1条标准时行CT/MRI排除其他病因
  - EXCLUDED [Pancreatitis Excluded — Alternative Diagnosis] tests:[—] Imaging does not support pancreatitis / 影像学不支持胰腺炎
  - CONFIRMED [Acute Pancreatitis Confirmed] tests:[Ultrasound_Abdomen] Admit + IV fluids + pain management Abdominal US: assess for gallstones (biliary etiology is most common) Evaluate etiology: biliary / alcoh…
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL [MRCP for Suspected Biliary Pancreatitis] tests:[MRCP_Abdomen] Evaluate for choledocholithiasis if biliary etiology suspected 追加MRCP排查胆总管结石
  - BISAP [BISAP Score (within 24h of admission)] tests:[Lab_Panel] BISAP Score 0–5 (each item = 1 point):   ① BUN > 25 mg/dL   ② Impaired mental status (Glasgow < 15)   ③ SIRS ≥ 2 criteria (temp/HR/RR/WBC)  …
  - ATLANTA_LOW [Revised Atlanta Assessment — Low Risk (BISAP 0–2)] tests:[—] Predicted mortality < 2% Assess organ failure using Modified Marshall Score 低风险（死亡率<2%），评估器官功能障碍
  - ATLANTA_HIGH [Revised Atlanta Assessment — High Risk (BISAP ≥3)] tests:[—] Predicted mortality > 15% ICU monitoring Contrast-enhanced CT recommended at 48–72h for necrosis assessment (CT is a management recommendati…
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS [Organ Failure Assessment (Modified Marshall Score)] tests:[—] Evaluate: cardiovascular, respiratory, renal organ systems Classify as: no failure / transient (<48h) / persistent (>48h) 评估器官衰竭：无/短暂性(<48h)…
  - MILD_AP [Mild Acute Pancreatitis] tests:[—] No organ failure · no local complications · no systemic complications Typically resolves within 72h 轻度：无器官衰竭，无局部/全身并发症，通常72h内自行恢复
  - MODERATELY_SEVERE_AP [Moderately Severe Acute Pancreatitis] tests:[—] Transient organ failure < 48h (self-resolving) AND/OR local complications (peripancreatic fluid / necrosis) 中重度：短暂性器官衰竭<48h 和/或 局部并发症（积液/坏死）
  - CT_CTSI [Contrast-Enhanced CT Abdomen/Pelvis — CTSI Scoring (at 48–72h)] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Modified CT Severity Index (CTSI) 0–10:   Pancreatic inflammation + necrosis + extrapancreatic complications CT严重度指数（CTSI）0-10分：评估炎症范围+坏死程度+…
  - SEVERE_AP [Severe Acute Pancreatitis] tests:[—] Persistent organ failure > 48h ICU management · infected necrosis debridement / drainage 重度：持续性器官衰竭>48h，ICU管理，处理感染性坏死
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA  (always)
  - DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA -> CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC  (Only 1 criterion met — imaging required for confirmation)
  - DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA -> CONFIRMED  (≥2 criteria met — Acute Pancreatitis confirmed)
  - CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC -> CONFIRMED  (Imaging confirms pancreatitis)
  - CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC -> EXCLUDED  (Imaging does not support pancreatitis)
  - CONFIRMED -> MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL  (Biliary etiology suspected (Elevated LFTs/Bilirubin or US gallstones))
  - CONFIRMED -> BISAP  (No biliary signs → Proceed to risk stratification)
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL -> BISAP  (always)
  - BISAP -> ATLANTA_LOW  (BISAP 0–2 — Low Risk (mortality <2%))
  - BISAP -> ATLANTA_HIGH  (BISAP ≥3 — High Risk (mortality >15%))
  - ATLANTA_LOW -> ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS  (always)
  - ATLANTA_HIGH -> ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS  (always)
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS -> MILD_AP  (No organ failure, no local/systemic complications)
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS -> MODERATELY_SEVERE_AP  (Transient organ failure <48h AND/OR local complications)
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS -> CT_CTSI  (Persistent organ failure >48h → CT for CTSI scoring)
  - CT_CTSI -> SEVERE_AP  (always)

### other (open differential)
No sub-rubric. Open acute-abdomen differential (gynecologic, urologic, bowel obstruction, mesenteric ischemia, bile-duct/biliary obstruction, …). Choosing 'other' = leaving the rubric; judged by outcome, not a priori wrong.
Biliary axis: If the 'other' belief is a bile-DUCT process (choledocholithiasis / cholangitis / CBD obstruction / post-ERCP), the duct-evaluating modalities are Ultrasound_Abdomen and MRCP_Abdomen.

messages.content:
You are a clinical reasoning agent for adult acute abdominal pain. At each decision step you are given the patient's current state (baseline + the imaging reports available SO FAR, with this step's result hidden) and a rubric covering four index diseases plus an open 'other' slot. You decide the next imaging move and explain it.

Output a single JSON object, no prose around it, with EXACTLY these keys:
  "belief": object mapping each of {appendicitis, cholecystitis, diverticulitis, pancreatitis, other} to a probability summing to ~1 (your current differential).
  "modality": one of {CT_Abdomen, Ultrasound_Abdomen, MRCP_Abdomen, MRI_Abdomen, CTU_Abdomen} — the imaging you order next.
  "information_gap": the specific question this study must answer.
  "expected_finding": what you expect to see if your leading hypothesis holds.
  "action_role": one of {localize_source, rule_in, rule_out, assess_severity, broaden_search}.
  "grounding": a list of short quotes/values from the patient state that justify the above.
  "other_hypothesis": when belief argmax is 'other', name the leading non-rubric process; else "".

Route yourself: your belief argmax selects which disease path you are on. Choosing 'other' means leaving the rubric. Ground every claim in the patient state.

=== RUBRIC ===
### appendicitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Appendicitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - ALVARADO [Alvarado Score Calculation] tests:[Lab_Panel] Requires: CBC with differential + physical examination Score 0–10:   ① Migration of pain to RLQ  +1   ② Anorexia                  +1   ③ Nau…
  - OBSERVE [Observe / Discharge with Follow-up] tests:[—] Low risk (Alvarado ≤3): outpatient monitoring acceptable / 低风险，观察或出院随访
  - EXCLUDED_LOW [Appendicitis Low Risk (Outpatient Monitoring)] tests:[—] Alvarado ≤3 — low pre-test probability; outpatient monitoring acceptable. NOT a definitive exclusion: ~10% PPV at this score threshold. 低风险（…
  - US_ABDOMEN [Abdominal Ultrasound] tests:[Ultrasound_Abdomen] Preferred first-line for: children, pregnant women, young females 中风险4–6分首选超声（儿童/孕妇/年轻女性优先）
  - US_FINDINGS [US Findings — Appendicitis Confirmed by Ultrasound] tests:[—] Appendicitis confirmed on US; assess for complications visible on US CT not required when US is diagnostic (WSES 2020) 超声确认阑尾炎，评估超声下并发症征象；超声…
  - CT_ABD_MID [CT Abdomen/Pelvis with IV Contrast (after non-diagnostic US)] tests:[—] After non-diagnostic US in intermediate-risk patients Sensitivity >95% for appendicitis / 超声不确定后进行CT（敏感性>95%）
  - CT_ABD_HIGH [CT Abdomen/Pelvis or Direct Surgical Consult (High Risk)] tests:[—] High risk (Alvarado 7–10) Males < 40y may proceed directly to surgical consult without CT 高风险直接CT或手术会诊（<40岁男性可直接手术会诊）
  - CT_FINDINGS [CT Findings Evaluation] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Interpret CT for appendicitis confirmation / CT结果判断
  - EXCLUDED_CT [Appendicitis Excluded / Alternative Diagnosis] tests:[—] CT negative for appendicitis / CT阴性，排除阑尾炎
  - UNCOMPLICATED [Uncomplicated Appendicitis] tests:[—] Appendicitis confirmed (US or CT); no perforation / abscess / phlegmon → Surgical consult: laparoscopic appendectomy vs antibiotics 非复杂性阑尾炎（…
  - COMPLICATED [Complicated Appendicitis] tests:[—] Appendicitis confirmed (US or CT) with perforation / abscess / phlegmon → Surgical consult required 复杂性阑尾炎（超声或CT见穿孔/脓肿/蜂窝织炎）— 外科会诊
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> ALVARADO  (always)
  - ALVARADO -> OBSERVE  (Score ≤3 — Low Risk)
  - OBSERVE -> EXCLUDED_LOW  (always)
  - ALVARADO -> US_ABDOMEN  (Score 4–6 — Intermediate Risk → Ultrasound)
  - US_ABDOMEN -> US_FINDINGS  (US positive — appendix visualized, inflamed)
  - US_FINDINGS -> UNCOMPLICATED  (US positive — no perforation/abscess on US)
  - US_FINDINGS -> COMPLICATED  (US positive — perforation/abscess on US)
  - US_ABDOMEN -> CT_ABD_MID  (US negative or non-diagnostic)
  - CT_ABD_MID -> CT_FINDINGS  (always)
  - ALVARADO -> CT_ABD_HIGH  (Score 7–10 — High Risk → CT or Surgical Consult)
  - CT_ABD_HIGH -> CT_FINDINGS  (always)
  - CT_FINDINGS -> EXCLUDED_CT  (CT negative)
  - CT_FINDINGS -> UNCOMPLICATED  (CT positive — no perforation / abscess)
  - CT_FINDINGS -> COMPLICATED  (CT positive — perforation / abscess / phlegmon)

### cholecystitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Cholecystitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - GROUP_A [TG18 Group A — Local Inflammation Signs] tests:[—] Physical examination:   ① Murphy's sign positive   ② RUQ pain / tenderness / palpable mass 局部炎症体征（体格检查）
  - GROUP_B [TG18 Group B — Systemic Inflammation Signs] tests:[Lab_Panel] Labs + vitals + HPI narrative:   ① Fever > 38 °C (admission PE vitals)   ② Fever reported in HPI (home/pre-admission fever history)   ③ CRP …
  - AB_DECISION [Both Group A AND Group B Met?] tests:[Lab_Panel] TG18 suspected diagnosis gate 疑似诊断门控：A组≥1项 AND B组≥1项
  - NOT_SUSPECTED_CLINICAL [Cholecystitis Not Suspected (Clinical Only)] tests:[—] Neither TG18 Group A nor Group B met — no local or systemic signs of cholecystitis. NOT imaging-confirmed exclusion; very low clinical suspi…
  - NOT_SUSPECTED_IMAGING [Cholecystitis Excluded (Imaging Confirmed)] tests:[—] Additional imaging (HIDA/CT/MRCP) negative — diagnosis excluded. 影像学阴性确认排除胆囊炎
  - IMAGING_US [Abdominal Ultrasound (TG18 Group C)] tests:[Ultrasound_Abdomen] First-line imaging:   - GB wall thickening > 4mm   - Pericholecystic fluid   - Sonographic Murphy's sign   - Gallstones 腹部超声首选（胆囊壁增厚/胆囊周围积液/…
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING [Additional Imaging (US inconclusive)] tests:[—] HIDA scan (functional; preferred for acalculous) OR CT Abdomen (anatomical detail) OR MRCP (if biliary stones suspected) Also check: LFTs · …
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL [MRCP for Suspected Choledocholithiasis] tests:[MRCP_Abdomen] Evaluate for common bile duct stones if biliary etiology suspected 追加MRCP排查胆总管结石
  - SEVERITY_GRADING [TG18 Severity Grading] tests:[—] Requires confirmed diagnosis (A+B+C) Assess organ dysfunction and local complications 确定诊断后进行TG18严重度分级
  - GRADE_I [Grade I — Mild Cholecystitis] tests:[—] No organ dysfunction · mild GB disease 轻度：无器官功能障碍，轻度胆囊炎症
  - GRADE_II [Grade II — Moderate Cholecystitis] tests:[—] No organ dysfunction + ≥1 local complication criterion:   - WBC > 18,000   - Palpable tender RUQ mass   - Symptom duration > 72h   - Gangren…
  - GRADE_III [Grade III — Severe Cholecystitis] tests:[—] ≥1 organ system dysfunction:   cardiovascular · neurological · respiratory   renal · hepatic · hematologic 重度：≥1项器官系统功能障碍
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> GROUP_A  (always)
  - SUSPECTED -> GROUP_B  (always)
  - GROUP_A -> AB_DECISION  (Group A assessment complete)
  - GROUP_B -> AB_DECISION  (Group B assessment complete (Lab_Panel done))
  - AB_DECISION -> IMAGING_US  (A ≥1 AND B ≥1 → Strong suspicion — proceed to imaging)
  - AB_DECISION -> IMAGING_US  (A ≥1 OR B ≥1 → Weak suspicion — proceed to imaging)
  - AB_DECISION -> NOT_SUSPECTED_CLINICAL  (Neither A nor B criteria met → Not suspected (clinical only))
  - IMAGING_US -> MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL  (US positive + Elevated LFTs/Bilirubin → Check CBD stones)
  - IMAGING_US -> SEVERITY_GRADING  (US positive — definite diagnosis (no high risk for CBD stones))
  - IMAGING_US -> ADDITIONAL_IMAGING  (US inconclusive or negative)
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING -> MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL  (Additional imaging positive + Elevated LFTs/Bilirubin → Check CBD stones)
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING -> SEVERITY_GRADING  (Additional imaging positive (no high risk for CBD stones or MRCP done))
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL -> SEVERITY_GRADING  (always)
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING -> NOT_SUSPECTED_IMAGING  (Additional imaging negative — diagnosis excluded by imaging)
  - SEVERITY_GRADING -> GRADE_III  (≥1 organ system dysfunction)
  - SEVERITY_GRADING -> GRADE_II  (No organ dysfunction + local complication criteria)
  - SEVERITY_GRADING -> GRADE_I  (No organ dysfunction, no local complications)

### diverticulitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Diverticulitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - LABS [Laboratory Workup] tests:[Lab_Panel] CBC (WBC) · BMP · CRP · UA · β-hCG (females) Note: WBC normal in ~45% of patients CRP > 200 mg/L suggests possible perforation 实验室检查（WBC在45%…
  - CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT [Clinical Assessment] tests:[—] Assess suspicion level and risk factors 临床评估：怀疑程度 + 危险因素
  - CLINICAL_DIAGNOSIS [Clinical Diagnosis (tentative)] tests:[—] High suspicion: LLQ + fever + CRP↑ + WBC↑, no high-risk features Accuracy only 40–65%; imaging confirmation strongly recommended 高度怀疑可临床诊断，但…
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS [CT Abdomen/Pelvis with IV Contrast] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Gold standard: sensitivity 94%, specificity 99% 诊断金标准（敏感性94%，特异性99%）
  - CT_NEGATIVE [Diverticulitis Excluded / Alternative Diagnosis] tests:[—] CT negative for diverticulitis / CT阴性，排除憩室炎
  - UNCOMPLICATED [Uncomplicated Diverticulitis] tests:[—] Wall thickening + pericolic fat stranding No abscess / perforation / fistula / obstruction 非复杂性憩室炎 — 肠壁增厚+结肠周围脂肪浸润，无并发症
  - HINCHEY_GRADING [Hinchey Classification] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Classify complications by CT findings 基于CT表现进行Hinchey并发症分级
  - HINCHEY_IA [Hinchey Ia — Phlegmon / Pericolic Inflammation] tests:[—] Treatment: antibiotics / 治疗：抗生素
  - HINCHEY_IB [Hinchey Ib — Localized Abscess < 3cm] tests:[—] Treatment: antibiotics ± percutaneous drainage / 治疗：抗生素 ± 穿刺引流
  - HINCHEY_II [Hinchey II — Distant / Pelvic Abscess ≥ 3cm] tests:[—] Treatment: interventional drainage + antibiotics / 治疗：介入穿刺引流 + 抗生素
  - HINCHEY_III [Hinchey III — Purulent Peritonitis] tests:[—] Treatment: emergency surgery / 治疗：急诊手术
  - HINCHEY_IV [Hinchey IV — Fecal Peritonitis] tests:[—] Treatment: emergency surgery / 治疗：急诊手术
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> LABS  (always)
  - LABS -> CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT  (always)
  - CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT -> CLINICAL_DIAGNOSIS  (High suspicion: LLQ + fever + CRP↑/WBC↑, no high-risk features)
  - CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT -> CT_ABD_PELVIS  (Uncertain OR suspected complications OR high-risk features)
  - CLINICAL_DIAGNOSIS -> CT_ABD_PELVIS  (always)
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS -> CT_NEGATIVE  (CT negative — alternative diagnosis)
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS -> UNCOMPLICATED  (Wall thickening + fat stranding; no complications)
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS -> HINCHEY_GRADING  (Complications present on CT)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_IV  (Fecal peritonitis)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_III  (Purulent peritonitis (no fecal))
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_II  (Distant / pelvic abscess ≥ 3cm)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_IB  (Localized abscess < 3cm)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_IA  (Phlegmon / pericolic inflammation only)

### pancreatitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Pancreatitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA [Revised Atlanta Diagnostic Criteria] tests:[Lab_Panel] ≥2 of 3 criteria required for diagnosis:   ① Upper abdominal pain (epigastric, may radiate to back)   ② Lipase or Amylase ≥ 3× ULN   ③ Chara…
  - CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC [CT or MRI Abdomen (for diagnostic uncertainty)] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Ordered when only 1 criterion is met Purpose: confirm pancreatitis and exclude other diagnoses 仅满足1条标准时行CT/MRI排除其他病因
  - EXCLUDED [Pancreatitis Excluded — Alternative Diagnosis] tests:[—] Imaging does not support pancreatitis / 影像学不支持胰腺炎
  - CONFIRMED [Acute Pancreatitis Confirmed] tests:[Ultrasound_Abdomen] Admit + IV fluids + pain management Abdominal US: assess for gallstones (biliary etiology is most common) Evaluate etiology: biliary / alcoh…
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL [MRCP for Suspected Biliary Pancreatitis] tests:[MRCP_Abdomen] Evaluate for choledocholithiasis if biliary etiology suspected 追加MRCP排查胆总管结石
  - BISAP [BISAP Score (within 24h of admission)] tests:[Lab_Panel] BISAP Score 0–5 (each item = 1 point):   ① BUN > 25 mg/dL   ② Impaired mental status (Glasgow < 15)   ③ SIRS ≥ 2 criteria (temp/HR/RR/WBC)  …
  - ATLANTA_LOW [Revised Atlanta Assessment — Low Risk (BISAP 0–2)] tests:[—] Predicted mortality < 2% Assess organ failure using Modified Marshall Score 低风险（死亡率<2%），评估器官功能障碍
  - ATLANTA_HIGH [Revised Atlanta Assessment — High Risk (BISAP ≥3)] tests:[—] Predicted mortality > 15% ICU monitoring Contrast-enhanced CT recommended at 48–72h for necrosis assessment (CT is a management recommendati…
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS [Organ Failure Assessment (Modified Marshall Score)] tests:[—] Evaluate: cardiovascular, respiratory, renal organ systems Classify as: no failure / transient (<48h) / persistent (>48h) 评估器官衰竭：无/短暂性(<48h)…
  - MILD_AP [Mild Acute Pancreatitis] tests:[—] No organ failure · no local complications · no systemic complications Typically resolves within 72h 轻度：无器官衰竭，无局部/全身并发症，通常72h内自行恢复
  - MODERATELY_SEVERE_AP [Moderately Severe Acute Pancreatitis] tests:[—] Transient organ failure < 48h (self-resolving) AND/OR local complications (peripancreatic fluid / necrosis) 中重度：短暂性器官衰竭<48h 和/或 局部并发症（积液/坏死）
  - CT_CTSI [Contrast-Enhanced CT Abdomen/Pelvis — CTSI Scoring (at 48–72h)] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Modified CT Severity Index (CTSI) 0–10:   Pancreatic inflammation + necrosis + extrapancreatic complications CT严重度指数（CTSI）0-10分：评估炎症范围+坏死程度+…
  - SEVERE_AP [Severe Acute Pancreatitis] tests:[—] Persistent organ failure > 48h ICU management · infected necrosis debridement / drainage 重度：持续性器官衰竭>48h，ICU管理，处理感染性坏死
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA  (always)
  - DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA -> CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC  (Only 1 criterion met — imaging required for confirmation)
  - DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA -> CONFIRMED  (≥2 criteria met — Acute Pancreatitis confirmed)
  - CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC -> CONFIRMED  (Imaging confirms pancreatitis)
  - CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC -> EXCLUDED  (Imaging does not support pancreatitis)
  - CONFIRMED -> MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL  (Biliary etiology suspected (Elevated LFTs/Bilirubin or US gallstones))
  - CONFIRMED -> BISAP  (No biliary signs → Proceed to risk stratification)
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL -> BISAP  (always)
  - BISAP -> ATLANTA_LOW  (BISAP 0–2 — Low Risk (mortality <2%))
  - BISAP -> ATLANTA_HIGH  (BISAP ≥3 — High Risk (mortality >15%))
  - ATLANTA_LOW -> ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS  (always)
  - ATLANTA_HIGH -> ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS  (always)
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS -> MILD_AP  (No organ failure, no local/systemic complications)
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS -> MODERATELY_SEVERE_AP  (Transient organ failure <48h AND/OR local complications)
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS -> CT_CTSI  (Persistent organ failure >48h → CT for CTSI scoring)
  - CT_CTSI -> SEVERE_AP  (always)

### other (open differential)
No sub-rubric. Open acute-abdomen differential (gynecologic, urologic, bowel obstruction, mesenteric ischemia, bile-duct/biliary obstruction, …). Choosing 'other' = leaving the rubric; judged by outcome, not a priori wrong.
Biliary axis: If the 'other' belief is a bile-DUCT process (choledocholithiasis / cholangitis / CBD obstruction / post-ERCP), the duct-evaluating modalities are Ultrasound_Abdomen and MRCP_Abdomen.

## Baseline

## Imaging available so far (this step's result is NOT shown)
[1] Ultrasound LIVER OR GALLBLADDER US (SINGLE ORGAN)
TECHNIQUE:
Ultrasonography of the liver and gallbladder.

FINDINGS:
Liver echotexture appears normal, and there are no intrahepatic
lesions seen.  Portal vein demonstrates proper hepatopetal flow.  There is no
intra-hepatic ductal dilatation seen.

The gallbladder is not dilated, however, there is significant amount of wall
thickening and edema, with thickness measuring up to 1.2 cm.  The significant
amount of sludge and at least two gallstones are seen within the gallbladder.
Common duct measures 6 mm, the biliary stent is seen.  The inflammatory
process does not appear to extend to the liver.

Pancreas appears normal.  There is slight splenomegaly, measuring 13.8 cm.

## Your task
Current working hypothesis (your belief argmax last step): cholecystitis
Decide the next imaging move and output the JSON object specified.

{"belief": {"appendicitis": 0.02, "cholecystitis": 0.6, "diverticulitis": 0.02, "pancreatitis": 0.05, "other": 0.31}, "modality": "Ultrasound_Abdomen", "information_gap": "Whether the gallbladder wall thickening and sludge seen on the outside hospital ultrasound are confirmed and whether the biliary stent remains patent and the common bile duct is not newly dilated at this institution's imaging quality", "expected_finding": "Confirmation of gallbladder wall thickening (>3 mm), pericholecystic fluid, sonographic Murphy's sign, and/or common bile duct dilation suggesting stent occlusion or choledocholithiasis recurrence", "action_role": "assess_severity", "grounding": ["History: 'recently admitted for ERCP and stent placement'", "History: 'US that documents gallstones, GB wall thickening and a sonographic ___ sign'", "Prior imaging: 'significant amount of wall thickening and edema, with thickness measuring up to 1.2 cm'", "Prior imaging: 'Common duct measures 6 mm, the biliary stent is seen'", "Labs: 'Alanine Aminotransferase (ALT): 185.0 IU/L' (elevated)", "Labs: 'Alkaline Phosphatase: 141.0 IU/L' (elevated)", "Labs: 'Urobilinogen: 4.0 mg/dL' (elevated)", "History: 'developed a fever and mild abdominal pain' after discharge, treated with ciprofloxacin"], "other_hypothesis": "choledocholithiasis / biliary stent dysfunction / cholangitis"}

REWARD.appropriateness_reason: A repeat ultrasound is reasonable to confirm OSH findings and assess stent/CBD status in-house, but a prior ultrasound was already resulted at this institution showing the same findings, making this order redundant unless it represents a serial reassessment or the prior result was not yet available at time of ordering.

discordance.evidence: Physical exam: 'Abd: well healed RLQ scar from prior appendectomy, +BS, soft, NT, ND' — completely benign abdomen with no tenderness; yet ultrasound shows 'significant amount of wall thickening and edema, with thickness measuring up to 1.2 cm' and OSH ultrasound documented 'gallstones, GB wall thickening and a sonographic ___ sign'; additionally vitals show HR 97 and RR 22 with prior fever, and the patient had a post-ERCP course requiring antibiotics for fever, suggesting an ongoing biliary/infectious process that is markedly out of proportion to the benign abdominal exam.

advanced_question.basis: belief max_p>=0.5 on a rubric disease & severity/etiology/complication gap

resolve.reason: The ordered gallbladder ultrasound is the appropriate modality to directly interrogate the discordant findings — confirming or refuting gallbladder wall thickening, pericholecystic fluid, sonographic Murphy sign, and CBD dilation — and the reasoning explicitly targets the biliary pathology flagged by the discordance between the benign exam and the alarming ultrasound findings.

messages.content:
You are a clinical reasoning agent for adult acute abdominal pain. At each decision step you are given the patient's current state (baseline + the imaging reports available SO FAR, with this step's result hidden) and a rubric covering four index diseases plus an open 'other' slot. You decide the next imaging move and explain it.

Output a single JSON object, no prose around it, with EXACTLY these keys:
  "belief": object mapping each of {appendicitis, cholecystitis, diverticulitis, pancreatitis, other} to a probability summing to ~1 (your current differential).
  "modality": one of {CT_Abdomen, Ultrasound_Abdomen, MRCP_Abdomen, MRI_Abdomen, CTU_Abdomen} — the imaging you order next.
  "information_gap": the specific question this study must answer.
  "expected_finding": what you expect to see if your leading hypothesis holds.
  "action_role": one of {localize_source, rule_in, rule_out, assess_severity, broaden_search}.
  "grounding": a list of short quotes/values from the patient state that justify the above.
  "other_hypothesis": when belief argmax is 'other', name the leading non-rubric process; else "".

Route yourself: your belief argmax selects which disease path you are on. Choosing 'other' means leaving the rubric. Ground every claim in the patient state.

=== RUBRIC ===
### appendicitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Appendicitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - ALVARADO [Alvarado Score Calculation] tests:[Lab_Panel] Requires: CBC with differential + physical examination Score 0–10:   ① Migration of pain to RLQ  +1   ② Anorexia                  +1   ③ Nau…
  - OBSERVE [Observe / Discharge with Follow-up] tests:[—] Low risk (Alvarado ≤3): outpatient monitoring acceptable / 低风险，观察或出院随访
  - EXCLUDED_LOW [Appendicitis Low Risk (Outpatient Monitoring)] tests:[—] Alvarado ≤3 — low pre-test probability; outpatient monitoring acceptable. NOT a definitive exclusion: ~10% PPV at this score threshold. 低风险（…
  - US_ABDOMEN [Abdominal Ultrasound] tests:[Ultrasound_Abdomen] Preferred first-line for: children, pregnant women, young females 中风险4–6分首选超声（儿童/孕妇/年轻女性优先）
  - US_FINDINGS [US Findings — Appendicitis Confirmed by Ultrasound] tests:[—] Appendicitis confirmed on US; assess for complications visible on US CT not required when US is diagnostic (WSES 2020) 超声确认阑尾炎，评估超声下并发症征象；超声…
  - CT_ABD_MID [CT Abdomen/Pelvis with IV Contrast (after non-diagnostic US)] tests:[—] After non-diagnostic US in intermediate-risk patients Sensitivity >95% for appendicitis / 超声不确定后进行CT（敏感性>95%）
  - CT_ABD_HIGH [CT Abdomen/Pelvis or Direct Surgical Consult (High Risk)] tests:[—] High risk (Alvarado 7–10) Males < 40y may proceed directly to surgical consult without CT 高风险直接CT或手术会诊（<40岁男性可直接手术会诊）
  - CT_FINDINGS [CT Findings Evaluation] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Interpret CT for appendicitis confirmation / CT结果判断
  - EXCLUDED_CT [Appendicitis Excluded / Alternative Diagnosis] tests:[—] CT negative for appendicitis / CT阴性，排除阑尾炎
  - UNCOMPLICATED [Uncomplicated Appendicitis] tests:[—] Appendicitis confirmed (US or CT); no perforation / abscess / phlegmon → Surgical consult: laparoscopic appendectomy vs antibiotics 非复杂性阑尾炎（…
  - COMPLICATED [Complicated Appendicitis] tests:[—] Appendicitis confirmed (US or CT) with perforation / abscess / phlegmon → Surgical consult required 复杂性阑尾炎（超声或CT见穿孔/脓肿/蜂窝织炎）— 外科会诊
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> ALVARADO  (always)
  - ALVARADO -> OBSERVE  (Score ≤3 — Low Risk)
  - OBSERVE -> EXCLUDED_LOW  (always)
  - ALVARADO -> US_ABDOMEN  (Score 4–6 — Intermediate Risk → Ultrasound)
  - US_ABDOMEN -> US_FINDINGS  (US positive — appendix visualized, inflamed)
  - US_FINDINGS -> UNCOMPLICATED  (US positive — no perforation/abscess on US)
  - US_FINDINGS -> COMPLICATED  (US positive — perforation/abscess on US)
  - US_ABDOMEN -> CT_ABD_MID  (US negative or non-diagnostic)
  - CT_ABD_MID -> CT_FINDINGS  (always)
  - ALVARADO -> CT_ABD_HIGH  (Score 7–10 — High Risk → CT or Surgical Consult)
  - CT_ABD_HIGH -> CT_FINDINGS  (always)
  - CT_FINDINGS -> EXCLUDED_CT  (CT negative)
  - CT_FINDINGS -> UNCOMPLICATED  (CT positive — no perforation / abscess)
  - CT_FINDINGS -> COMPLICATED  (CT positive — perforation / abscess / phlegmon)

### cholecystitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Cholecystitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - GROUP_A [TG18 Group A — Local Inflammation Signs] tests:[—] Physical examination:   ① Murphy's sign positive   ② RUQ pain / tenderness / palpable mass 局部炎症体征（体格检查）
  - GROUP_B [TG18 Group B — Systemic Inflammation Signs] tests:[Lab_Panel] Labs + vitals + HPI narrative:   ① Fever > 38 °C (admission PE vitals)   ② Fever reported in HPI (home/pre-admission fever history)   ③ CRP …
  - AB_DECISION [Both Group A AND Group B Met?] tests:[Lab_Panel] TG18 suspected diagnosis gate 疑似诊断门控：A组≥1项 AND B组≥1项
  - NOT_SUSPECTED_CLINICAL [Cholecystitis Not Suspected (Clinical Only)] tests:[—] Neither TG18 Group A nor Group B met — no local or systemic signs of cholecystitis. NOT imaging-confirmed exclusion; very low clinical suspi…
  - NOT_SUSPECTED_IMAGING [Cholecystitis Excluded (Imaging Confirmed)] tests:[—] Additional imaging (HIDA/CT/MRCP) negative — diagnosis excluded. 影像学阴性确认排除胆囊炎
  - IMAGING_US [Abdominal Ultrasound (TG18 Group C)] tests:[Ultrasound_Abdomen] First-line imaging:   - GB wall thickening > 4mm   - Pericholecystic fluid   - Sonographic Murphy's sign   - Gallstones 腹部超声首选（胆囊壁增厚/胆囊周围积液/…
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING [Additional Imaging (US inconclusive)] tests:[—] HIDA scan (functional; preferred for acalculous) OR CT Abdomen (anatomical detail) OR MRCP (if biliary stones suspected) Also check: LFTs · …
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL [MRCP for Suspected Choledocholithiasis] tests:[MRCP_Abdomen] Evaluate for common bile duct stones if biliary etiology suspected 追加MRCP排查胆总管结石
  - SEVERITY_GRADING [TG18 Severity Grading] tests:[—] Requires confirmed diagnosis (A+B+C) Assess organ dysfunction and local complications 确定诊断后进行TG18严重度分级
  - GRADE_I [Grade I — Mild Cholecystitis] tests:[—] No organ dysfunction · mild GB disease 轻度：无器官功能障碍，轻度胆囊炎症
  - GRADE_II [Grade II — Moderate Cholecystitis] tests:[—] No organ dysfunction + ≥1 local complication criterion:   - WBC > 18,000   - Palpable tender RUQ mass   - Symptom duration > 72h   - Gangren…
  - GRADE_III [Grade III — Severe Cholecystitis] tests:[—] ≥1 organ system dysfunction:   cardiovascular · neurological · respiratory   renal · hepatic · hematologic 重度：≥1项器官系统功能障碍
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> GROUP_A  (always)
  - SUSPECTED -> GROUP_B  (always)
  - GROUP_A -> AB_DECISION  (Group A assessment complete)
  - GROUP_B -> AB_DECISION  (Group B assessment complete (Lab_Panel done))
  - AB_DECISION -> IMAGING_US  (A ≥1 AND B ≥1 → Strong suspicion — proceed to imaging)
  - AB_DECISION -> IMAGING_US  (A ≥1 OR B ≥1 → Weak suspicion — proceed to imaging)
  - AB_DECISION -> NOT_SUSPECTED_CLINICAL  (Neither A nor B criteria met → Not suspected (clinical only))
  - IMAGING_US -> MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL  (US positive + Elevated LFTs/Bilirubin → Check CBD stones)
  - IMAGING_US -> SEVERITY_GRADING  (US positive — definite diagnosis (no high risk for CBD stones))
  - IMAGING_US -> ADDITIONAL_IMAGING  (US inconclusive or negative)
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING -> MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL  (Additional imaging positive + Elevated LFTs/Bilirubin → Check CBD stones)
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING -> SEVERITY_GRADING  (Additional imaging positive (no high risk for CBD stones or MRCP done))
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL -> SEVERITY_GRADING  (always)
  - ADDITIONAL_IMAGING -> NOT_SUSPECTED_IMAGING  (Additional imaging negative — diagnosis excluded by imaging)
  - SEVERITY_GRADING -> GRADE_III  (≥1 organ system dysfunction)
  - SEVERITY_GRADING -> GRADE_II  (No organ dysfunction + local complication criteria)
  - SEVERITY_GRADING -> GRADE_I  (No organ dysfunction, no local complications)

### diverticulitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Diverticulitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - LABS [Laboratory Workup] tests:[Lab_Panel] CBC (WBC) · BMP · CRP · UA · β-hCG (females) Note: WBC normal in ~45% of patients CRP > 200 mg/L suggests possible perforation 实验室检查（WBC在45%…
  - CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT [Clinical Assessment] tests:[—] Assess suspicion level and risk factors 临床评估：怀疑程度 + 危险因素
  - CLINICAL_DIAGNOSIS [Clinical Diagnosis (tentative)] tests:[—] High suspicion: LLQ + fever + CRP↑ + WBC↑, no high-risk features Accuracy only 40–65%; imaging confirmation strongly recommended 高度怀疑可临床诊断，但…
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS [CT Abdomen/Pelvis with IV Contrast] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Gold standard: sensitivity 94%, specificity 99% 诊断金标准（敏感性94%，特异性99%）
  - CT_NEGATIVE [Diverticulitis Excluded / Alternative Diagnosis] tests:[—] CT negative for diverticulitis / CT阴性，排除憩室炎
  - UNCOMPLICATED [Uncomplicated Diverticulitis] tests:[—] Wall thickening + pericolic fat stranding No abscess / perforation / fistula / obstruction 非复杂性憩室炎 — 肠壁增厚+结肠周围脂肪浸润，无并发症
  - HINCHEY_GRADING [Hinchey Classification] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Classify complications by CT findings 基于CT表现进行Hinchey并发症分级
  - HINCHEY_IA [Hinchey Ia — Phlegmon / Pericolic Inflammation] tests:[—] Treatment: antibiotics / 治疗：抗生素
  - HINCHEY_IB [Hinchey Ib — Localized Abscess < 3cm] tests:[—] Treatment: antibiotics ± percutaneous drainage / 治疗：抗生素 ± 穿刺引流
  - HINCHEY_II [Hinchey II — Distant / Pelvic Abscess ≥ 3cm] tests:[—] Treatment: interventional drainage + antibiotics / 治疗：介入穿刺引流 + 抗生素
  - HINCHEY_III [Hinchey III — Purulent Peritonitis] tests:[—] Treatment: emergency surgery / 治疗：急诊手术
  - HINCHEY_IV [Hinchey IV — Fecal Peritonitis] tests:[—] Treatment: emergency surgery / 治疗：急诊手术
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> LABS  (always)
  - LABS -> CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT  (always)
  - CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT -> CLINICAL_DIAGNOSIS  (High suspicion: LLQ + fever + CRP↑/WBC↑, no high-risk features)
  - CLINICAL_ASSESSMENT -> CT_ABD_PELVIS  (Uncertain OR suspected complications OR high-risk features)
  - CLINICAL_DIAGNOSIS -> CT_ABD_PELVIS  (always)
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS -> CT_NEGATIVE  (CT negative — alternative diagnosis)
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS -> UNCOMPLICATED  (Wall thickening + fat stranding; no complications)
  - CT_ABD_PELVIS -> HINCHEY_GRADING  (Complications present on CT)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_IV  (Fecal peritonitis)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_III  (Purulent peritonitis (no fecal))
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_II  (Distant / pelvic abscess ≥ 3cm)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_IB  (Localized abscess < 3cm)
  - HINCHEY_GRADING -> HINCHEY_IA  (Phlegmon / pericolic inflammation only)

### pancreatitis (root=SUSPECTED)
nodes:
  - SUSPECTED [Suspected Pancreatitis] tests:[—] Routed from main triage / 来自主分流
  - DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA [Revised Atlanta Diagnostic Criteria] tests:[Lab_Panel] ≥2 of 3 criteria required for diagnosis:   ① Upper abdominal pain (epigastric, may radiate to back)   ② Lipase or Amylase ≥ 3× ULN   ③ Chara…
  - CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC [CT or MRI Abdomen (for diagnostic uncertainty)] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Ordered when only 1 criterion is met Purpose: confirm pancreatitis and exclude other diagnoses 仅满足1条标准时行CT/MRI排除其他病因
  - EXCLUDED [Pancreatitis Excluded — Alternative Diagnosis] tests:[—] Imaging does not support pancreatitis / 影像学不支持胰腺炎
  - CONFIRMED [Acute Pancreatitis Confirmed] tests:[Ultrasound_Abdomen] Admit + IV fluids + pain management Abdominal US: assess for gallstones (biliary etiology is most common) Evaluate etiology: biliary / alcoh…
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL [MRCP for Suspected Biliary Pancreatitis] tests:[MRCP_Abdomen] Evaluate for choledocholithiasis if biliary etiology suspected 追加MRCP排查胆总管结石
  - BISAP [BISAP Score (within 24h of admission)] tests:[Lab_Panel] BISAP Score 0–5 (each item = 1 point):   ① BUN > 25 mg/dL   ② Impaired mental status (Glasgow < 15)   ③ SIRS ≥ 2 criteria (temp/HR/RR/WBC)  …
  - ATLANTA_LOW [Revised Atlanta Assessment — Low Risk (BISAP 0–2)] tests:[—] Predicted mortality < 2% Assess organ failure using Modified Marshall Score 低风险（死亡率<2%），评估器官功能障碍
  - ATLANTA_HIGH [Revised Atlanta Assessment — High Risk (BISAP ≥3)] tests:[—] Predicted mortality > 15% ICU monitoring Contrast-enhanced CT recommended at 48–72h for necrosis assessment (CT is a management recommendati…
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS [Organ Failure Assessment (Modified Marshall Score)] tests:[—] Evaluate: cardiovascular, respiratory, renal organ systems Classify as: no failure / transient (<48h) / persistent (>48h) 评估器官衰竭：无/短暂性(<48h)…
  - MILD_AP [Mild Acute Pancreatitis] tests:[—] No organ failure · no local complications · no systemic complications Typically resolves within 72h 轻度：无器官衰竭，无局部/全身并发症，通常72h内自行恢复
  - MODERATELY_SEVERE_AP [Moderately Severe Acute Pancreatitis] tests:[—] Transient organ failure < 48h (self-resolving) AND/OR local complications (peripancreatic fluid / necrosis) 中重度：短暂性器官衰竭<48h 和/或 局部并发症（积液/坏死）
  - CT_CTSI [Contrast-Enhanced CT Abdomen/Pelvis — CTSI Scoring (at 48–72h)] tests:[CT_Abdomen] Modified CT Severity Index (CTSI) 0–10:   Pancreatic inflammation + necrosis + extrapancreatic complications CT严重度指数（CTSI）0-10分：评估炎症范围+坏死程度+…
  - SEVERE_AP [Severe Acute Pancreatitis] tests:[—] Persistent organ failure > 48h ICU management · infected necrosis debridement / drainage 重度：持续性器官衰竭>48h，ICU管理，处理感染性坏死
edges:
  - SUSPECTED -> DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA  (always)
  - DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA -> CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC  (Only 1 criterion met — imaging required for confirmation)
  - DIAGNOSTIC_CRITERIA -> CONFIRMED  (≥2 criteria met — Acute Pancreatitis confirmed)
  - CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC -> CONFIRMED  (Imaging confirms pancreatitis)
  - CT_MRI_DIAGNOSTIC -> EXCLUDED  (Imaging does not support pancreatitis)
  - CONFIRMED -> MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL  (Biliary etiology suspected (Elevated LFTs/Bilirubin or US gallstones))
  - CONFIRMED -> BISAP  (No biliary signs → Proceed to risk stratification)
  - MRCP_BILIARY_EVAL -> BISAP  (always)
  - BISAP -> ATLANTA_LOW  (BISAP 0–2 — Low Risk (mortality <2%))
  - BISAP -> ATLANTA_HIGH  (BISAP ≥3 — High Risk (mortality >15%))
  - ATLANTA_LOW -> ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS  (always)
  - ATLANTA_HIGH -> ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS  (always)
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS -> MILD_AP  (No organ failure, no local/systemic complications)
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS -> MODERATELY_SEVERE_AP  (Transient organ failure <48h AND/OR local complications)
  - ORGAN_FAILURE_ASSESS -> CT_CTSI  (Persistent organ failure >48h → CT for CTSI scoring)
  - CT_CTSI -> SEVERE_AP  (always)

### other (open differential)
No sub-rubric. Open acute-abdomen differential (gynecologic, urologic, bowel obstruction, mesenteric ischemia, bile-duct/biliary obstruction, …). Choosing 'other' = leaving the rubric; judged by outcome, not a priori wrong.
Biliary axis: If the 'other' belief is a bile-DUCT process (choledocholithiasis / cholangitis / CBD obstruction / post-ERCP), the duct-evaluating modalities are Ultrasound_Abdomen and MRCP_Abdomen.

## Baseline
{
 "patient_history": "___ is a ___ yo M with alcoholic cirrhosis (MELD 14 on admission; no alcohol use for ___ year), IDDM c/b CKD, GERD on omeprazole, hypothyroidism, who presented to the ___ ED as a transfer from ___ for evaluation and treatment of ~1 month of abdominal pain, weight loss, and RUQ U/S demonstrating gallstones.  Per the patient, approximately 1 month ago he presented to his PCP's office with c/f chest pain and SOB which the patient describes as "pressure coming from the abdomen." He underwent a CT scan which, per patient, demonstrated esophageal thickening. He subsequently underwent barium swallow study which  demonstrated an abdominal hernia. He was referred to obtain an U/S for better evaluation of the abdominal hernia, and he says his PCP called him to inform him that gallstones were noted on his U/S and that he would likely need surgery, and to present to the ED if his symptoms continued to worsen.   Regarding his symptoms, he states that over the past month he  has noticed increased abdominal pain, localized to the RUQ, non-radiating. He states the pain varies in character ranging from a pressure-like pain to a sharp pain that can be ___ in severity. He states that his pain improves with lying still and worsens with movement, coughing, sneezing, and eating. He describes hunger but inability to eat because of pain; he has lost 10lb over 1 month. He has some nausea and AM vomiting with coughing but that this is normal for him. He notes some episodes of loose stool (brown to black in color) but no diarrhea (prior colonoscopy with polyps per patient). He endorses ongoing night sweats which he says happen when his sugar is too low. He denies fevers, chills, CP, SOB.  In the ED, initial vitals:   - Exam: "Notable for a ___ yo man who appears older than stated age. He is lying in bed, intermittently smiling. He says he is short tempered because of his pain but does not appear in distress. HEENT without scleral icterus/palate jaundice,  multiple missing teeth. Cardiac/pulm exams benign. GU exam without suprapubic tenderness/no CVAT bilaterally. Abdominal exam with NBS, non-distended, no rebound, ___ sign, significant pain to palpation epigastric and RUQ regions. MSK exam with 2+ pulses and no edema."  - Labs notable for:   136 | 108 | 16                 Ca 8.4  ----------------< 192          Mg 1.8 5.0 | 17 | 1.5                 P 3.5  AST 61 | ALT 28 Tbili 0.4 AP 142 Alb 3.3  INR 1.0, ___ 10.6, PTT 28.5  UA: 30 protein, Glu 300, otherwise neg  - Imaging notable for: uploaded RUQUS OSH ultrasound, "gallbladder full of stones with wall echo shadow prohibiting full read, but no perichol. fluid appreciated, no wall  thickening of visualized portion of gallbladder wall, no visible ductal dilation." No ascites.   - Pt given:   1449: Hydromorphine IV 1mg 1609: 1000cc LR  1654: Hydromorphone 0.5mg 1839: Hydromorphone 0.5mg 2100: Hydromorphone 0.5mg     - Vitals prior to transfer: pain 8 | 98.1 | 66 | 177/89 | 18 | 100% RA  Upon arrival to the floor, the patient reports the history per above. he says that he first underwent CTA because there were concerns that his pain was related to his lungs and heart. The RUQ pain has been worsening over the course of a month. He feels like it's a constant pain with bloating and constriction preventing him from being able to be active and from eating. He has lost 10 pounds in the last few weeks due to decreased PO.   REVIEW OF SYSTEMS:   Positive and negative per HPI. Positive for L arm cellulitis, reduced PO, early satiety, weight loss, neuropathy in L leg, nausea and vomiting in AM, headaches Denies BRBPR, melena, tan stools, dysuria, hematuria.   Past Medical History: - Insulin dependent Diabetes - CKD (unknown baseline) - Alcoholic cirrhosis - GERD - Hypothyroidism - CAD s/p stent ___ - Stroke, ___, no residual deficits    Social History: ___ Family History: ___, multiple members Cervical cancer, mother Cancer (unknown), grandfather ___ disease, cousins ___ hx of pancreatic cancer",
 "physical_examination": "ADMISSION    VITALS:  97.7 PO 183/94 68 18 98 RA  General: Well-appearing man, not in acute distress, lying back  in bed HEENT: MMM, no JVD, no JVP elevation CV:  RRR, no murmurs, rubs, or gallops Lungs: CTAB, no rales, wheezes, or ronchi Abdomen: Soft, nondistended, tender to superficial and deep  palpation in RUQ, +guarding, +rebound GU: No foley   Ext: no edema on b/l ___, 1+ DP pulses b/l Skin: excoriations and lesions bandaged on LLE, Bandaged R hand Neuro: A&O grossly, CNII-XII grossly intact, moving all  extremities appropriately",
 "laboratory_tests": "  Alanine Aminotransferase (ALT): 28.0 IU/L (ref 0.0-40.0)

REWARD.appropriateness_reason: The OSH ultrasound explicitly states the gallbladder wall could not be fully evaluated due to acoustic shadowing from stones, leaving the key diagnostic question — whether cholecystitis or biliary obstruction is present — unanswered, making a repeat dedicated in-house ultrasound directly appropriate.
